title: bupleurum terminum
intro: Bupleurum terminum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or stemless hare's ear, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-viral, and anti-bacterial effects, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system. The health benefits of Bupleurum terminum include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and improving liver function, among others. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum terminum is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, decoctions, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
